spawn_point.notes: Start near the desk/chair area. Adjust in Godot if the sprite overlaps furniture too much.

horizontal_movement_bounds.notes: Bounds are for the player origin/feet point, not the full sprite rectangle.

blocking_collision.purpose: Prevent walking past the left wall.
Prevent walking past the right wall.

optional_jump_platforms.notes: Optional standable chair seat for limited jump interactions. Tune after testing player sprite feet alignment.

interaction_zones.label: Bed
interaction_zones.interaction: Show prompt when player is near the bed.

interaction_zones.label: Computer Monitor
interaction_zones.interaction: Show prompt when player is near the desk computer.

interaction_zones.label: Fridge
interaction_zones.interaction: Show prompt when player is near the fridge.

interaction_zones.label: Cabinet Near Door
interaction_zones.interaction: Show prompt when player is near the cabinet by the door.

notes: This bundle intentionally keeps furniture baked into the background for MVP speed.
All interaction zones should be invisible Area2D nodes in Godot.
The primary_walk_line_y is a starting estimate and can be tuned directly in Godot without regenerating art.
The chair platform is optional. Remove it if jump interactions feel unnecessary in this room.
